---
title: "Boruta escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
---

# Boruta
```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_nul_corrAleat.RData")
library(Boruta)

set.seed(123)

resultats_fp_boruta <- data.frame(
  N           = integer(),
  pi          = numeric(),
  correlation = character(),
  FP          = numeric(),
  FP_percent  = numeric()
)

system.time({

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- comb$correlation[i]

    fp_boruta <- numeric(iters)

    for (j in 1:iters) {

      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j, "\n")

      X_df  <- as.data.frame(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_fac <- as.factor(Y[[i]][[j]])

      df_boruta <- data.frame(y = y_fac, X_df)

      tryCatch({

        model_boruta <- suppressWarnings(
          Boruta(
            y ~ .,
            data = df_boruta,
            doTrace = 0,
            maxRuns = 100
          )
        )

        seleccionades <- getSelectedAttributes(
          model_boruta,
          withTentative = FALSE
        )

        fp_boruta[j] <- length(seleccionades)

      }, error = function(e) {

        cat(sprintf(
          "  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n",
          i, j, conditionMessage(e)
        ))

        fp_boruta[j] <<- 0
      })
    }

    resultats_fp_boruta <- rbind(
      resultats_fp_boruta,
      data.frame(
        N           = N,
        pi          = pi,
        correlation = as.character(correlation),
        FP          = mean(fp_boruta),
        FP_percent  = mean(fp_boruta) / num_vars
      )
    )
  }
})

print(resultats_fp_boruta)

save(resultats_fp_boruta,file = "resultats_fp_boruta_nul.RData")
```
